# Issue #42: Add user authentication

## Context

This is a test fixture representing a scratchpad after /tackle-scratchpad-block has executed S001 and is partway through the plan.

## Implementation Plan

```json
{
  "finish_issue_on_complete": true,
  "steps": [
    {
      "id": "S001",
      "title": "Add user model and migration",
      "status": "done",
      "done_when": "User table exists with email, password_hash columns; model exported",
      "depends_on": [],
      "files": ["src/models/user.ts", "src/migrations/001-create-users.sql"],
      "tasks": [
        "Create User model in src/models/user.ts",
        "Add migration file for users table"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "S002",
      "title": "Add auth middleware",
      "status": "in_progress",
      "done_when": "Protected routes return 401 without valid session",
      "depends_on": ["S001"],
      "files": ["src/middleware/auth.ts"],
      "tasks": [
        "Create requireAuth middleware"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "S003",
      "title": "Add login and logout endpoints",
      "status": "pending",
      "done_when": "POST /login returns session cookie; POST /logout clears it; tests pass",
      "depends_on": ["S001", "S002"],
      "files": ["src/routes/auth.ts", "src/__tests__/auth.test.ts"],
      "tasks": [
        "Add POST /login and POST /logout endpoints",
        "Add tests covering happy path and edge cases"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```
